headline: Shares of restaurant and food related companies are trading higher after Iran signaled that the Strait of Hormuz will remain open for the duration of the ceasefire, easing concerns around energy costs and inflation risk.

headline: Is Chipotle Mexican Grill (CMG) Pricing Look Stretched After Recent Share Price Rebound
summary: Investors may be wondering if Chipotle Mexican Grill at US$35.08 is starting to look interesting again, or if the recent price has already baked in most of the value. The stock has returned 2.5% over the last 7 days and 1.9% over the last 30 days, but year to date it is down 6.4% and the 1 year return is a 27.2% decline. Recent coverage has focused on Chipotle Mexican Grill's position in the U.S. restaurant space and how its brand and pricing power are holding up against consumer spending...

headline: RBC Capital Maintains Outperform on Chipotle Mexican Grill, Lowers Price Target to $45
